title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Osmania University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Osmania University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Osmania University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Osmania University:
Osmania University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Osmania University!
